title: 芯片股暴跌拖累美股，纳指重挫超1,100点
content: U.S. stocks plunged Friday as chip stocks dragged markets down. The Nasdaq Composite plummeted over 1,100 points, marking its worst single-day performance in more than a year. The sell-off was driven by concerns over rising interest rates and doubts about AI spending, abruptly ending weeks of sustained gains on Wall Street.
eventKey: 芯片股暴跌拖累美股-纳指重挫超1-100点

summary: U.S. stocks plunged Friday as chip stocks dragged markets down. The Nasdaq Composite plummeted over 1,100 points, marking its worst single-day performance in more than a year. The sell-off was driven by concerns over rising interest rates and doubts about AI spending, abruptly ending weeks of sustained gains on Wall Street.

title: 英伟达官宣推出全球首款完全开放的全模态物理 AI 模型 NVIDIA Cosmos 3
content: 2026 中国台北 GTC 大会上，英伟达官宣面向物理 AI 的开放世界基础模型 NVIDIA Cosmos3，该模型凭借全新混合 Transformer 架构，打通视觉推理、世界生成、动作预测三大核心能力，成为全球首款完全开放的全模态物理 AI 模型。同时，英伟达牵头成立 NVIDIA Cosmos Coalition 全球协作联盟，集结全球顶尖世界模型研发团队与 AI 开发者，共同推动下一代开放世界模型的技术迭代与落地普及，宣告物理 AI 规模化落地时代加速到来。 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 MCP 接入 英伟达官宣推出全球首款完全开放的全模态物理 AI 模型 NVIDIA Cosmos 3 前天 2026 中国台北 GTC 大会上， 英伟达 官宣面向物理 AI 的开放世界基础模型 NVIDIA Cosmos3，该模型凭借全新混合 Transformer 架构，打通视觉推理、世界生成、动作预测三大核心能力，成为全球首款完全开放的全模态物理 AI 模型。同时，英伟达牵头成立 NVIDIA Cosmos Coalition 全球协作联盟，集结全球顶尖世界模型研发团队与 AI 开发者，共同推动下一代开放世界模型的技术迭代与落地普及，宣告物理 AI 规模化落地时代加速到来。 NVIDIA 发布 Cosmos 3：全球首个全开源物理 AI 全能模型面世 -- 快科技 -- 科技改变未来 快科技 英伟达官宣推出全球首款完全开放的全模态物理 AI 模型 NVIDIA Cosmos 3 36Kr / 金融界 智通港股早知道 | 工信部开展 6G 创新发展部省协同试点 英伟达 (NVDA.US) 推出全球首款完全开放的全模态物理 AI 模型 金融界
eventKey: 英伟达官宣推出全球首款完全开放的全模态物理-nvidia-cosmos
normalizedTitle: 英伟达官宣推出全球首款完全开放的全模态物理 ai 模型 nvidia cosmos 3
scoreReasoning: 英伟达发布新AI模型，AI能力形态变化的重要信号。对AI平台格局、芯片需求有未来影响。
summary: Nvidia announced Cosmos 3, the world's first fully open multimodal physical AI model, at GTC 2026 in Taipei. Built on a novel hybrid Transformer architecture, it integrates visual reasoning, world generation, and action prediction. Nvidia also launched the Cosmos Coalition to advance open-world model development with global research teams, accelerating large-scale deployment of physical AI.

content: SpaceX 已告知投行其 IPO 发行价定为每股 135 美元，不会变动。 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 MCP 接入 SpaceX 据悉告知投行其 IPO 发行价定为每股 135 美元，不会变动 前天 知情人士：SpaceX 告知投行，IPO 发行价维持每股 135 美元不变 新浪科技 2026-06-06 SpaceX IPO 获超额认购，预计 6 月 12 日开盘交易 2026-06-05 SpaceX 据悉告知投行其 IPO 发行价定为每股 135 美元，不会变动 2026-06-04 SpaceX 用 17 分钟的视频向散户推介 IPO 2026-06-04 SpaceX 官方拟定 IPO 发行价为 135 美元 估值达 1.77 万亿美元 2026-06-02 SpaceX 拟预留至多 5% IPO 股份供员工及高管亲友认购 2026-05-30 SpaceX 据悉将 IPO 估值目标下调到至少 1.8 万亿美元 2026-05-21 SpaceX 正式提交 IPO 申请 2026-05-20 SpaceX 的 IPO 可能将为 Founders Fund 和 Valor 各自带来超过 600 亿美元的收益 2026-05-19 SpaceX 正式启动「1 拆 5」拆股计划 为史上最大 IPO 扫清高价障碍 2026-05-18 SpaceX 敲定 6 月 12 日上市 贝莱德拟投至少 50 亿美元 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签

title: 姚顺雨：需要建立长期 AGI 组织 ，腾讯 AI 下半场主攻三方向
content: Tencent's chief AI scientist Yao Shunyu stated at the Tencent AI Industry Summit that the most important task for the next phase of AI is to establish a long-term AGI organization in China. Tencent AI will focus on three directions: optimizing foundational work like pre-training and post-training; converting basic technology into practical products that create value for society; and actively exploring new research paradigms to uncover new opportunities.
eventKey: 姚顺雨-需要建立长期-agi-下半场主攻三方向
normalizedTitle: 姚顺雨 需要建立长期 agi 组织 腾讯 ai 下半场主攻三方向
scoreReasoning: 腾讯AI负责人战略表态，高personalRelevance。对未来中国AI产业组织形态有判断价值。但内容偏向宏观宣示。
summary: Tencent's chief AI scientist Yao Shunyu stated at the Tencent AI Industry Summit that the most important task for the next phase of AI is to establish a long-term AGI organization in China. Tencent AI will focus on three directions: optimizing foundational work like pre-training and post-training; converting basic technology into practical products that create value for society; and actively exploring new research paradigms to uncover new opportunities.

title: Building Search for AI Agents with Exa CEO Will Bryk
content: Sarah Wang interviews Exa CEO Will Bryk about building search infrastructure for AI agents. They discuss why traditional search engines fail for autonomous systems, how retrieval and agent workflows differ from human search, and why search may become foundational to the agent economy. Bryk also addresses AI-native products, information discovery, and reframing technology problems as search problems.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Sarah Wang, Will Bryk)
eventKey: building-search-agents-exa-ceo-will
normalizedTitle: building search for ai agents with exa ceo will bryk
representativeSources: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Sarah Wang, Will Bryk)
scoreReasoning: a16z对行业CEO采访，深入讨论Agent搜索架构，有判断价值，但非突发。
summary: Sarah Wang interviews Exa CEO Will Bryk about building search infrastructure for AI agents. They discuss why traditional search engines fail for autonomous systems, how retrieval and agent workflows differ from human search, and why search may become foundational to the agent economy. Bryk also addresses AI-native products, information discovery, and reframing technology problems as search problems.

title: 2026 06 06 HackerNews
content: 2026-06-06 Hacker News Top Stories # 标普道琼斯指数公司坚持让SpaceX等大型IPO等待12个月才能纳入指数，延缓了被动基金资金流入。 Ladybird浏览器项目因AI生成垃圾PR威胁安全与质量控制，放弃公开Pull Request模式。 Anthropic开源了用Claude进行自主漏洞发现与修复的参考框架，默认针对C/C++内存漏洞且采用沙箱隔离。 《纽约时报》通过难以退订的营销邮件强制推广订阅，暴露其短视且损害信任的绝望营销策略。 纪录片《C++: The Documentary》回顾了C++四十年历程，指出其已成为用户增长最快的全球语言之一。 研究通过地面GNSS数据追踪到一个自2019年起干扰欧洲等地的俄罗斯“闪电”轨道预警卫星星座。 国际空间站俄罗斯舱段空气泄漏恶化，宇航员在维修两处泄漏点后暂避货运飞船，现已安全返回。 Meta智能眼镜应用Stella已内置面部识别技术管道，但普通用户界面暂不可见，功能就绪待开关。 英国政府将GOV.UK Pay支付处理从Stripe切换至Adyen，引入“Pay by Bank”银行转账功能。 Meta在弃用的Portal设备上启用ADB，但此前曾以安全为由拒绝开放设备以延长寿命。 1. SpaceX 及其他大型 IPO 被标普拒绝快速纳入指数 (SpaceX, Other Mega IPOs Denied Fast Index Entry by S&P) # https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-06-04/s-p-dow-jones-keeps-megacap-ipo-rules-as-is-after-consultation S&P 道琼斯指数公司宣布，将维持现有上市新股纳入 S&P 500 等基准指数的 12 个月等待期，不会为 SpaceX 等大型 IPO 开辟快速通道。这意味着这些公司无法立即进入指数，被动基金数十亿美元的资金流入将被推迟。该决定与 Nasdaq 和 FTSE Russell 等行业竞争对手的做法背道而驰。 HN 热度 921 points | 评论 477 comments | 作者：tristanj | 1 day ago # https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48405718 SuperTechFans Chinese English Posts 2026 2026-06 06-06 06-05 06-03 06-02 2026-05 05-31 05-30 05-29 05-28 05-27 05-26 05-25 05-23 05-22 05-21 05-20 05-19 05-18 05-17 05-15 05-14 05-13 05-12 05-11 05-10 05-09 05-08 05-07 05-06 05-05 05-04 05-03 05-02 05-01 2026-04 04-30 04-29 04-28 04-27 04-26 04-24 04-23 04-22 04-21 04-20 04-19 04-18 04-17 04-16 04-15 04-14 04-13 04-12 04-11 04-10 04-09 04-08 04-07 04-06 04-05 04-04 04-03 04-02 04-01 2026-03 03-31 03-30 03-29 03-28 03-27 03-26 03-25 03-24 03-23 03-22 03-21 03-20 03-19 03-18 03-17 03-16 03-15 03-14 03-13 03-12

The Ladybird browser project ends public pull requests due to AI-generated spam threatening security and quality. Anthropic open-sources a reference framework for autonomous AI-powered vulnerability discovery, defaulting to C/C++ memory flaws with sandboxed execution. The New York Times uses non-unsubscribable marketing emails, drawing criticism for desperate trust-eroding tactics. A new documentary traces C++'s 40-year evolution and notes its strong growth. Researchers traced GNSS interference over Europe to Russian Molniya-orbit satellites since 2019. ISS astronauts temporarily sheltered in a cargo craft during Russian module air leak repairs but have safely returned. content: Aifei 是世界首个 AI Coding 框架。 Aifei 不是在传统框架之上增加 AI 用法，而是从框架结构本身出发，围绕大模型理解、生成和维护代码的方式，重新设计 Java 服务端开发。 过去三年，AI 写代码的能力快速跃升。代码生成正在从“辅助”走向“主导…
